author: MIYh
content: Result: Implemented crossbridge-supervisor crate. Public API: async fn run(socket_path) loops indefinitely. Single tokio current_thread runtime; main task uses tokio::select over listener.accept() and an mpsc Event channel. Per-connection registration readers and EOF watchers spawn as separate tasks and report back via the channel. Topology: HashMap group/slug/ConnId plus HashMap of ConnRecord per id. On registration: nack on duplicate, mkdir slug dir, ack with peer slugs, fanout PeerJoined, store. On departure: remove from maps, abort reader, drop write half, rmdir slug, fanout PeerLeft. Failed notification fanout enqueues a Departed event for that peer (recursive cleanup as spec requires). Startup wipes base_dir contents (AC-4, AC-5). 8 integration tests cover all AC-6 scenarios. cargo build/test/clippy/fmt clean on whole workspace.
